hero.title: Pixel Crunch
hero.subtitle: Compress and optimize images directly in your browser.
hero.description: Your files never leave your device.

status.phase: Phase 1 completed. Coming soon: Compression engine (Phase 2).

privacy.title: Total Privacy
privacy.description: Your images are never uploaded to any server. All processing happens in your browser.

fast.title: Fast & Efficient
fast.description: Instant image compression using modern web technology.

free.title: Free & Open Source
free.description: Open source code, no usage limits, no subscriptions.

upload.title: Upload your images
upload.helperLabel: Supported formats: JPG/JPEG/JFIF, PNG, WebP, GIF, and SVG
upload.sizeErrorLabel: File is too large. Maximum size: 10 MB.
upload.typeErrorLabel: Unsupported format. Only JPG/JPEG/JFIF, PNG, WebP, GIF, and SVG are allowed.

upload.title: Upload your images
upload.helperLabel: Supported formats: HEIC, JPG/JPEG/JFIF, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, AVIF, and ICO
upload.sizeErrorLabel: File is too large. Maximum size: 10 MB.

panel.noPendingLabel: There are no pending files to convert.
panel.partialErrorLabel: One or more files could not be converted.
panel.animatedGifWarningLabel: Detected {count} animated GIF file(s). Only the first frame was exported.
panel.gifStrategyLabel: GIF note: animated GIF files are converted using the first frame to keep output compatibility.

stats.title: Compression stats
stats.description: Estimated comparison between original and compressed size.
stats.emptyStateLabel: No compression data to show yet.
